message:
chore: add .gitignore patterns for beads recovery, rch cache, and session test artifacts

- Ignore .beads/.br_recovery/ directory (crash/interrupt recovery snapshots)
- Ignore .beads/*.backup.* files (timestamped DB backups)
- Ignore .rch/ directory (remote compilation helper local cache)
- Ignore __CHANGESET__ and __PATCHSET__ (session extension binary test artifacts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -214,3 +214,14 @@ gemini.mcp.json
 .beads/*.bak-corrupt
 tmp_golden/
 tmp_rch_probe/
+
+# Beads recovery/backup snapshots
+.beads/.br_recovery/
+.beads/*.backup.*
+
+# Remote compilation helper local cache
+.rch/
+
+# Session extension binary test artifacts
+__CHANGESET__
+__PATCHSET__
